protocols.Paper_title: Strand Transfer and Elongation of HIV-1 Reverse Transcription Is Facilitated by Cell Factors In Vitro
protocols.Evidence: ERT reaction ... sufficient to lyse virions (0.2 mM Triton X-100) ... products analysed by quantitative PCR; RT-PCR on viral RNA after addition of Triton X-100

protocols.Paper_title: Strand Transfer and Elongation of HIV-1 Reverse Transcription Is Facilitated by Cell Factors In Vitro
protocols.Evidence: “extracts were ethanol precipitated, washed with 70% ethanol… Purified reaction products… added to… SYBR Green I… Platinum Taq polymerase”

protocols.Paper_title: Strand Transfer and Elongation of HIV-1 Reverse Transcription Is Facilitated by Cell Factors In Vitro
protocols.Evidence: “Triton X-100 detergent was added at room temperature to virions… [samples]… centrifuged at 100,000 g”

protocols.Paper_title: Strand Transfer and Elongation of HIV-1 Reverse Transcription Is Facilitated by Cell Factors In Vitro
protocols.Evidence: “Cells… were washed and lysed using the Dounce homogeniser. The lysate was cleared by centrifugation… followed by ultracentrifugation”
